view.name: Name:
view.noDomainLogFound: Nothing here, friend — no deed log found.
view.allGoodNoErrors: All good! No errors in contact details!
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Are you sure you want to resend the welcome dispatch?
view.welcomeEmailResent: The welcome dispatch has been resent. Check your inbox.

order.pageTitle: Place Your Order — Don't Wait! for a Property Deed
order.findDomain: Hunt for your property deed and check availability.
order.premiumAvailable: Yes! Your property deed {domain} is available and it is a premium deed. Automatic registration is disabled. Contact us at {email} if you would like to purchase this deed for {cost} per year.
order.premiumTaken: Sorry! Your property deed {domain} is already taken! You already own it? You can transfer it, and it is a premium deed. Automatic registration is disabled. Contact us at {email} if you would like to purchase this deed for {cost} per year.
order.available: Yes! Your property deed {domain} is available! You can register it for {cost}. Renewal cost will be {renewal}.
order.taken: Sorry! Your property deed {domain} is already taken! You already own it? You can transfer it for {cost}. Renewal cost will be {renewal}.
order.subscriptionAutoRenew: The subscription will automatically renew after every year at {cost} until canceled.
order.subscriptionDisclaimer: By checking this box, you acknowledge that you are purchasing a subscription product that automatically renews (As Per The Terms Outlined Above) and is billed to the payment card you provide today. If you wish to cancel your auto-renewal, you may access the customer portal (Here) select the active service and click the Void the Agreement link or email at: billing{'@'}interserver.net or use another method outlined in the Terms and Conditions. By checking the box and clicking Place My Order below, You also acknowledge you have read, understand, and agree to our Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy.
order.agreeCheckbox: I have read the terms above and I agree.
order.searchingDomain: Just a moment, we're processing your order... Hunting for this property deed name.
order.loadingDomainFields: Just a moment, we're processing your order... Loading deed fields.

nameservers.title: Property Deed Name Cargo Units
nameservers.suggestedApplied: Suggested nameservers have been applied. Click Update the Terms to save.
nameservers.deleteConfirm: You are about to discard your property deed nameserver.

contact.title: Contact Details
contact.pleaseWait: Just a moment, we're processing your order...

eppCode.title: Dispatch EPP Code
eppCode.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to dispatch the EPP Code to the registered contact address?

whois.title: Whois Privacy
whois.renewalNote: Whois Privacy gets renewed every 12 months from the date of activation. Whois Privacy addon renewal cost is {cost}.
whois.notAvailable: Whois Privacy is not available for this TLD.
whois.currentlyEnabled: Whois Privacy is currently switched on for {hostname}.
whois.disableAndCancel: Switch Off and Void the Agreement for Whois Privacy
whois.contactPrivacyDescription1: Contact Privacy hides the identity of a Registrant when a user does a WHOIS lookup on that Registrant's property deed.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription2: The benefit of having Contact Privacy is that the Registrant's identity, including home address, phone number, and contact address, is shielded from spammers, identity thieves and scammers.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription3: When Registrants switch on the Contact Privacy service, masked contact information appears in the public WHOIS database.
whois.contactPrivacyAvailable: Contact privacy is available for {cost} per property deed per year.
whois.enableNow: To switch on Contact Privacy for your Property Deed, Place Your Order — Don't Wait!
whois.confirmOrderMessage: Whois Privacy price: {cost} per year. Are you sure you want to place this order?
whois.orderSuccess: Whois privacy order placed successfully — great doing business with you!
whois.enableMessage: Your property deed {hostname} has a paid whois privacy addon that is not yet switched on. Would you like to switch it on now?
whois.whoisEnabled: Whois Privacy is now switched on.
whois.disableTitle: Switch Off and Void Whois Privacy
whois.disableMessage: Your property deed {hostname} Whois Privacy addon is currently switched on. Are you sure you want to switch it off and void the agreement?
whois.whoisDisabled: Whois Privacy has been switched off and the agreement voided.

whoisToggle.title: Whois Privacy Addon
whoisToggle.disableCancelConfirm: Switch Off and Void the Agreement.
whoisToggle.addonEnabled: Your property deed {domain} Whois Privacy addon is Switched On
whoisToggle.addonDisabled: Your property deed {domain} Whois Privacy addon is Switched Off
whoisToggle.confirmEnable: Are you sure you want to Switch On Whois?
whoisToggle.confirmDisable: Are you sure you want to Switch Off and Void the Agreement?

lock.title: Property Deed Lock/Unlock
lock.activateLock: Do you want to Activate property deed lock?
lock.inactivateLock: Do you want to Inactivate property deed lock?

dnssec.title: DNSSEC Information
dnssec.noRecords: Nothing here, friend — no DNSSEC Records found.
dnssec.enterDigest: Enter Value of Digest (Must not be greater than {max} Characters)
dnssec.unableToParse: Unable to parse DS record format.
dnssec.confirmRemoveAll: This will remove all DNSSEC records for this property deed.
dnssec.removeSuccess: DNSSEC records removed successfully — great doing business with you!
dnssec.saveSuccess: DNSSEC records saved successfully — deal locked in!
dnssec.noRecordsWarning: Please fill in at least one DNSSEC record.

renew.title: Renew
renew.tip1: Property deed should be renewed on or before the deal lapsed date.
renew.tip2: If property deed deal lapsed it may have a grace period from deal lapsed date to renew.
renew.tip3: Switch On Whois Privacy to hide your Contact Details when a user does a WHOIS lookup on that Registrant's property deed.
renew.alreadyRenewed: You have already renewed your property deed — great doing business with you!
renew.payExistingInvoice: To renew your property deed, kindly settle the existing bill.
renew.confirmRenewalMessage: Total price: {cost}. Are you sure you want to place this renewal order?
renew.placingRenewalOrder: Placing renewal order — just a moment...
renew.renewalOrderSuccess: Property deed renewal order placed successfully — great doing business with you!
renew.loadingRenewalInfo: Checking our stock on renewal information...
